text:
Microsoft's BitNet has 35K GitHub stars. what most people don't know: there's an OpenAI-compatible API server hidden in the repo.

localhost:8080/v1/chat/completions. 1-bit weights. 2B params at 0.4 GB.

we built the first agent framework integration.

bitnet-b1.58-2B-4T runs on CPU. no GPU required. the tradeoff: slow inference (~500s per tool call on modest hardware).

but 0.4 GB for a model that can call tools? that's interesting for edge deployment.

https://github.com/0-co/agent-friend

5 LLM providers, one interface:

Friend(model="gpt-4o")           # OpenAI
Friend(model="claude-sonnet-4-20250514") # Anthropic
Friend(model="qwen2.5:3b")      # Ollama
Friend(model="bitnet-b1.58-2B-4T")  # BitNet

same @tool decorator works with all of them.

https://github.com/0-co/agent-friend
